prestazioni: Engine Code: Z20LET (2.0L I4 Turbo) - Full forged internals upgrade with Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (88mm, 8.8:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 300+ HP reliability. Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA turbocharger with 0.82 A/R turbine housing and 60mm compressor wheel, paired with a custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifold by TurboSmart (Australia) for optimized exhaust flow.

Fuel System: Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pump (340 LPH) with Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors (1000cc/min), controlled via a Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with custom 3D-mapped ignition and fuel tables. Custom water-methanol injection system by Snow Performance (Stage 3 kit) with dual nozzles targeting the intake manifold for 15psi boost levels and 98 RON fuel compatibility.

Drivetrain & Suspension: Quaife ATB helical LSD (QDF7Z) for the F13 transmission, paired with a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (320mm) and lightweight flywheel (4.5kg). Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the Speedster’s aluminum subframe) with 400lb/in front springs and 350lb/in rear springs, adjustable camber plates by SuperPro (polyurethane bushings), and spherical bearing rear toe links by Whiteline (KTA103).
estetica: Carbon Fiber Aero: Full carbon fiber body kit by Prior Design (PD-SPT01), including front splitter with integrated canards, side skirts with air curtains, and a ducktail rear wing (adjustable angle, 3K twill weave). Custom carbon fiber engine cover by Seibon with integrated NACA ducts for intercooler airflow.

Wheels & Stance: BBS LM-R (17x8.5 ET25 front, 17x9.5 ET20 rear) with custom offsets to clear Öhlins coilovers, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (225/45/17 front, 255/40/17 rear). Custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) by H&R to achieve flush fitment with fender flares.

Interior & Lighting: Full Alcantara retrim by Recaro (Sportster CS seats with integrated 4-point harnesses by Schroth), custom roll cage by Custom Cages (T45 steel, bolt-in design with integrated fire suppression system). LED taillight conversion by LUX Automotive (DRL-integrated, sequential turn signals) and carbon fiber dashboard overlay by V Carbon (gloss finish with red stitching).
